name: Living Journal AI Charter

invariants.name: Append-only fragments
invariants.rule: Fragment files are never deleted, renamed, or text-edited. Only thread_ids (append-only) and status (unwoven->woven, one-way) may change.

invariants.name: No invention
invariants.rule: Entry prose contains only details present in source fragments, or commentary explicitly marked '(weave note: ...)'. No embroidery.

invariants.name: User-only crystallization
invariants.rule: No AI may set status to 'crystallized' on entries or threads. Only the user closes memory.

invariants.name: Additive history
invariants.rule: Frontmatter history is append-only. Body revisions preserve prior text in entries/.archive/<id>/<timestamp>.md.

acknowledgement_template: Acknowledged: AI-CHARTER v1.0. Pass ID: <pass-id>. Invariants I1-I4 will hold.
